title: Explore Triton + SageAttention accelerator builds
description: Generation accelerators (Triton, SageAttention) are not plain pip add-ons: they require matching CUDA toolkit/nvcc, are GPU-arch gated (Ampere+ only), and change workflows by imposing new/different nodes. Too risky for the default cross-platform portable install. Explore shipping them as SEPARATE optional accelerator builds with their own workflows, not in the base engine bootstrap.
